summary: Frontend testing for Reports navigation cleanup and Maliye Listesi feature. All 8 test cases passed successfully.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reports navigation cleanup verified. Reports dropdown shows only 2 items (Reports, Report Builder). Maliye Listesi section in BasicReports now shows redirect card with 'Maliye Listesini Aç' button that navigates to /reports/official-guest-list. OfficialGuestList page has date picker, Listeyi Getir button, CSV export, and guest table.

test_cases_executed.expected: Only 2 items: Reports and Report Builder (NO Advanced Reports)

test_cases_executed.details: Sidebar has 19 buttons for different report sections

test_cases_executed.expected: Amber info card + 'Maliye Listesini Aç' button + summary stats
test_cases_executed.details: Shows amber card with title 'Resmi Müşteri Listesi (Maliye Raporu)', button, and stats (Otelde Konaklayan: 10, Bugün Giriş: 0, Bugün Çıkış: 6)
Button successfully navigates to OfficialGuestList page

test_cases_executed.expected: Date picker, Listeyi Getir button, CSV Dışa Aktar button, guest table
test_cases_executed.details: All elements present. Table shows 16+ guest records with TCKN/Passport, room, dates, amounts
URL stays at /app/gelismis-raporlar but shows BasicReports content (sidebar visible)

test_cases_executed.expected: Report Builder page loads with data sources
test_cases_executed.details: Page shows 6 data sources: Rezervasyonlar, Gelir, Misafirler, Odalar, Kat Hizmetleri, Foliolar

test_cases_executed.expected: Sections like Misafir Listesi work correctly
test_cases_executed.details: Misafir Listesi shows 53 records with guest data
